dataset: UCI Machine Learning Repository - Online Retail Dataset

pi_items.metadata_value: UCI Machine Learning Repository - Online Retail Dataset (Subset)
pi_items.verified_value: UCI Machine Learning Repository - Online Retail Dataset (Subset)
pi_items.source: Downloaded the UCI Online Retail Dataset from https://archive.ics.uci.edu/static/public/352/online+retail.zip and verified that the aggregated metrics (last invoice date, count of non-cancelled invoices, total spent) match exactly with the provided sample data for customer IDs 12346, 12747, and 12748.
Analyzed setup_task.sh which generates 'Customer_Data', 'Scoring_Rules', and 'Segment_Mapping', and task.json instructions which require the creation of the 'Segment_Summary' sheet.
Analyzed task.json instructions and verifier.py. The instructions explicitly ask to add these columns, and verifier.py checks for these column names (case-insensitive substring match).

privileged_info_summary: The data is a real subset of the UCI Machine Learning Repository's Online Retail Dataset, containing aggregated customer metrics (excluding cancellations). The initial spreadsheet contains 3 sheets ('Customer_Data', 'Scoring_Rules', 'Segment_Mapping') with one new sheet ('Segment_Summary') required. The task expects 6 specific columns to be calculated and added: Recency_Days, R_Score, F_Score, M_Score, RFM_Score, and Customer_Segment.
